work_package_result.summary: Implemented Node-owned durable project registration and trust: Dennett can create an empty project or attach an existing folder, preserve a stable Project ID across moves, optionally publish the minimal portable .dennett identity and shared-memory structure, keep personal policy local, restore restricted, trusted, revoked and missing states after restart, and prevent untrusted or stale projects from reaching the agent runtime.

passed: 106 focused Rust tests passed across trust, SQLite, Node and authenticated local IPC after the bounded instruction-enumeration repair
15 targeted Head conversation tests passed, including fail-closed project admission and trust-revocation ordering
59 sequential desktop regression tests passed without changing the accepted M01 presentation surface
two real subscription-backed Codex canaries passed after granting Trusted-Bounded through authenticated IPC: native same-turn steering and continuation of the same session after a real Node restart

mise exec -- just check passed the complete local repository gate, including format, Clippy with warnings denied, workspace tests, Python suites, TypeScript checks, protocol compatibility, documentation, planning and repository metadata
the public Linux Fast Gate passed after capability-relative directory synchronization was made compatible with O_PATH
the public hosted-Windows desktop IPC, detached Node lifecycle, Tauri watch bridge and renderer-boundary job passed after canonical binding comparison was made authoritative
not_run: desktop project creation and existing-folder interaction remain WP-M02-008 and were intentionally not simulated as completed UI
exact filesystem, command and Codex effect scopes remain WP-M02-004 through WP-M02-006
long-duration soak, fuzzing, disk-full endurance and resource-exhaustion campaigns remain release-wide hardening

review.method: An independent R3 closure review audited project identity, canonical path handling, trust admission, rebinding, crash durability and recovery. Confirmed findings were repaired, retested and re-reviewed. The owner then explicitly accepted the internal package and its diff-budget overage; public Linux and Windows CI passed on the accepted repair commit.
findings_closed: made project trust revocation and workspace rebinding linearly ordered with provider admission by holding a short per-project authority permit
made the normal conversation constructor fail closed for project scope when no real project registry is installed
made portable project metadata publication atomic and crash-durable with platform-appropriate write-through and directory synchronization
bounded instruction discovery during enumeration and records incomplete evidence instead of collecting an unbounded tree first
reopened Linux capability directories relative to their already verified handles before fsync so O_PATH does not cause EBADF or ambient path re-resolution
made the hosted-Windows regression compare the admitted workspace with the Node-owned canonical binding rather than a lexical temporary-path alias
updated live Codex canaries to grant trust through authenticated public IPC instead of weakening the M02 Restricted default

migrations: introduced project-registry schema version 3 for stable project identity, relocatable bindings, local trust decisions, instruction fingerprints and durable registration operations
preserves the configured M01 project as a legacy stable identity and restores it as Missing instead of silently rebinding mismatched history
observability_changes: registration, canonicalization, trust transitions, missing-location changes and instruction-fingerprint changes emit privacy-safe correlated evidence
prepared, filesystem-applied and committed registration phases survive restart and retry without duplicate projects, bindings or direct sessions
trust and workspace admission failures use actionable stable codes without logging source contents or raw local paths
known_limitations: this package deliberately exposes no new visible desktop flow; WP-M02-008 owns the user-facing folder picker, .dennett choice and trust presentation
the portable .dennett/memory container is only a shared-memory location until a later milestone writes a canonical Memory Fabric manifest
a copied folder without portable identity is a new project unless the local filesystem identity proves it is the same binding
project trust authorizes admission only; later M02 packages still enforce exact filesystem, command, provider and Git effect scopes
follow_up_candidates: WP-M02-004 workspace snapshots, scoped file effects and checkpoint recovery
WP-M02-005 bounded command and test execution
WP-M02-006 project instruction delivery to the provider runtime
WP-M02-008 owner-approved desktop project import and review UX
